overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a survival horror game showing a female character exploring a dense, foggy forest at night with a flashlight. The character approaches a rustic wooden cabin, enters it, and explores the dimly lit interior filled with furniture and clutter.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense foggy forest trail with stone ruins

events.description: passing under an old stone archway gate structure in the forest

agents.ego_description: walking cautiously through the dense foggy forest, sweeping the flashlight beam across trees and path

entered.detail: tall pine trees shrouded in thick fog surrounding the path
narrow winding dirt trail covered with fallen leaves
ancient stone archway structure covered in moss spanning the path
weathered wooden fence posts along the right side of the trail

segments.scene_description: The character navigates a narrow, fog-shrouded forest trail surrounded by dense trees. The flashlight beam cuts through the mist, illuminating the dirt path as the character approaches and passes under an old stone archway structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: forest clearing approach with distant cabin

events.description: wooden cabin becomes visible through the fog in the distance ahead

agents.ego_description: continuing along the forest path toward a distant structure visible through the trees

entered.detail: small rustic wooden cabin with lit windows visible through the fog

segments.scene_description: Having passed the stone ruins, the character continues through the forest as the trees thin slightly. A wooden cabin with glowing windows becomes visible in the foggy distance ahead, marking the destination.

events.description: arriving at the cabin entrance and stepping inside

agents.ego_description: approaching the wooden cabin and entering through the open doorway

entered.detail: wooden picnic table situated near the cabin exterior
open doorway of the wooden cabin revealing warm interior light

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the dense forest into a clearing and approaches the rustic wooden cabin. Passing a picnic table, the character walks up to the open doorway and steps inside, transitioning from the foggy exterior to the sheltered interior.

events.description: transition from dark foggy exterior to dimly lit warm interior
character slows and looks around the room, examining objects

agents.ego_description: moving cautiously through the cabin interior, examining the cluttered room and approaching an interior door

entered.detail: rough wooden plank walls of the cabin interior
wooden table with various items including a box and dishes
white wooden rocking chair near the wall
metal shelving unit filled with boxes and supplies
single exposed light bulb hanging from ceiling illuminating the room
dark doorway leading to another room in the cabin

segments.scene_description: Inside the cabin, the character explores a cluttered room with wooden walls illuminated by a single hanging light bulb. The space contains a wooden table, rocking chair, and storage shelves. The character moves toward a dark interior doorway at the far end of the room.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a claustrophobic, fog-shrouded forest trail into the dimly lit interior of a rustic cabin. It begins with the character navigating a narrow dirt path where a flashlight beam cuts through dense mist, passing beneath the ruins of an old stone archway. As the trees begin to thin, the camera tracks forward to reveal a wooden cabin with glowing windows emerging from the distance. The scene then opens into a clearing, passing a picnic table before the character steps through an open doorway, transitioning from the damp exterior to a sheltered room. Finally, the environment shifts to a cluttered interior of wooden walls illuminated by a single hanging bulb, moving past a rocking chair and storage shelves toward a dark doorway at the far end of the space.
